title: Shettihalli Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Shettihalli Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Karnataka

overview.short: Shettihalli Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary in the state of Karnataka, India.
overview.description: Shettihalli Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary in the state of Karnataka, India. It was declared a wildlife sanctuary on 23 November 1974. Featuring a variety of flora and fauna, Shettihalli Wildlife Sanctuary is situated in the Shimoga district of Karnataka. The sanctuary is home to species of animals such as white-backed vultures, Indian nightjar, and white-bellied dingo.

topPlaces.name: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Gajanur
topPlaces.description: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Gajanur (JNVG) is a boarding school near Gajanur, Shimoga, India. JNVG is funded by the Indian Ministry of Human Resources Development.

topPlaces.name: Gajanur, Shimoga
topPlaces.description: Gajanur is a village 12 km from Shimoga in the Shimoga district of Karnataka, India. The Tunga river flows through the village.

items.note: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Gajanur (JNVG) is a boarding school near Gajanur, Shimoga, India. JNVG is funded by the Indian Ministry of Human Resources Development.
Gajanur is a village 12 km from Shimoga in the Shimoga district of Karnataka, India. The Tunga river flows through the village.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shettihalli Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shettihalli Wildlife Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shettihalli Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (115 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (127 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shettihalli Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shettihalli Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shettihalli Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Shettihalli Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shettihalli Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Gajanur, Gajanur, Shimoga.
